page_metadata.biotools__summary:
In silico analysis of missense mutations in exons 1-5 of the F9 gene that cause hemophilia B.

PROVEAN ( Pro tein V ariation E ffect An alyzer) is a software tool which predicts whether an amino acid substitution or indel has an impact on the biological function of a protein.

PROVEAN is useful for filtering sequence variants to identify nonsynonymous or indel variants that are predicted to be functionally important.
